mapper.select: SELECT p_id as id, p_name as name, p_order_count as order_count, p_rank as rank FROM product

SELECT p_id as id, p_name as name, p_order_count as order_count, p_rank as rank FROM product, (SELECT cg_id as id FROM category WHERE cg_id LIKE CONCAT(#{id}, '%')) ta1 where ta1.id = product.p_category
SELECT p_id as id, p_name as name, p_order_count as order_count, p_rank as rank FROM product
SELECT p_id as id, p_name as name, p_price as price, p_order_count as order_count, p_views as views, p_category as category, p_quantity as quantity FROM product
